tree.setup: A clothing store in a shopping mall, racks of jackets and shirts organized by color like a paint gradient. The shop assistant, Xiao Peng, has developed the ability to guess a customer's size from across the room — a talent he compares to a wine sommelier's ability to identify a vintage by scent. He approaches with a measuring tape draped over his shoulder like a stethoscope.
tree.setup_zh: 商场里的服装店，衣架上的夹克和衬衫按颜色排列，像渐变色卡。店员小彭练出了隔着房间猜客人尺码的能力——他把这比作侍酒师凭气味鉴别年份的本事。他走过来，卷尺搭在肩上，像听诊器一样。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 帅哥，看看衣服？你穿L号的对不对？
turns.text_pinyin: shuàigē, kànkan yīfu? nǐ chuān L hào de duì bú duì?
turns.text_en: Hey handsome, looking at clothes? You wear a large, right?

options.text_zh: 你怎么知道！确实是L号。我想找一件休闲的外套。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ zěnme zhīdào! quèshí shì L hào. wǒ xiǎng zhǎo yí jiàn xiūxián de wàitào.
options.text_en: How'd you know! It is a large. I'm looking for a casual jacket.
options.feedback: Confirming his talent fuels his enthusiasm. Xiao Peng is already pulling three options from the rack.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ bú quèdìng. wǒ shìshi L hào ba.
options.text_en: I'm not sure. I'll try a large.
options.feedback: He'll bring both L and M to be safe. A sommelier always offers options.
The phrase that haunts every shop assistant. Xiao Peng nods and retreats to a respectful distance.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 休闲外套我推荐这三件。这件深蓝色的很百搭，这件灰色的比较正式一点。你先试试？
turns.text_pinyin: xiūxián wàitào wǒ tuījiàn zhè sān jiàn. zhè jiàn shēn lánsè de hěn bǎidā, zhè jiàn huīsè de bǐjiào zhèngshì yìdiǎn. nǐ xiān shìshi?
turns.text_en: For casual jackets I recommend these three. This navy one goes with everything, this gray one is a bit more formal. Want to try them on?

options.text_zh: 深蓝色的看起来不错，我先试这件。试衣间在哪里？
options.text_pinyin: shēn lánsè de kàn qǐlái búcuò, wǒ xiān shì zhè jiàn. shì yī jiān zài nǎlǐ?
options.text_en: The navy looks good — I'll try that first. Where's the fitting room?
options.feedback: Decisive choice plus asking for the fitting room. Xiao Peng escorts you like a sommelier leading you to the tasting room.
He gathers all three and leads you to the fitting room with visible satisfaction.

options.text_zh: 这个颜色我不太喜欢。有没有黑色的？
options.text_pinyin: zhège yánsè wǒ bú tài xǐhuān. yǒu méiyǒu hēisè de?
options.text_en: I don't really like these colors. Do you have black?
options.feedback: Xiao Peng pivots without missing a beat. He was testing you with the first three — the black one was his real recommendation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 怎么样？合适吗？肩膀那里刚好，袖子长度也不错。
turns.text_pinyin: zěnmeyàng? héshì ma? jiānbǎng nàlǐ gānghǎo, xiùzi chángdù yě búcuò.
turns.text_en: How is it? Does it fit? The shoulders are just right, and the sleeve length looks good.

options.text_zh: 肩膀合适，但是腰那里有点紧。有没有稍微宽松一点的？
options.text_pinyin: jiānbǎng héshì, dànshì yāo nàlǐ yǒudiǎn jǐn. yǒu méiyǒu shāowēi kuānsōng yìdiǎn de?
options.text_en: Shoulders fit, but it's a bit tight around the waist. Anything slightly looser?
options.feedback: Specific body-part feedback — Xiao Peng's diagnostic skills activate. He reaches for a different cut in the same color.

options.text_en: It's OK, just a bit tight.
options.feedback: He'll suggest the next size up or a different style.
Xiao Peng's professional pride takes a micro-hit, but he has backup options ready.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这件试试，同样的颜色，版型稍微宽松。打八折的话三百二十块。
turns.text_pinyin: zhè jiàn shìshi, tóngyàng de yánsè, bǎnxíng shāowēi kuānsōng. dǎ bā zhé de huà sānbǎi èrshí kuài.
turns.text_en: Try this one — same color, slightly looser cut. With the 20% off discount it's 320 yuan.

options.text_zh: 这件好多了！很舒服。三百二十可以接受。我买了。
options.text_pinyin: zhè jiàn hǎo duō le! hěn shūfu. sānbǎi èrshí kěyǐ jiēshòu. wǒ mǎi le.
options.text_en: This one's much better! Very comfortable. 320 is fine. I'll take it.
options.feedback: The sommelier has matched the perfect vintage. Xiao Peng folds the jacket with the reverence of someone wrapping a gift.
He nods. He'll be here when you decide — the jacket will be on hold.

options.text_pinyin: néng bu néng zài piányi yìdiǎn?
options.feedback: In a mall store, prices are usually fixed. Xiao Peng explains that 八折 is already the best he can do.

tree.cultural_note: Chinese clothing sizes often use S/M/L/XL but can run smaller than Western sizes. 打折 (dǎzhé) means discount — 打八折 (dǎ bā zhé) is 80% of original price (i.e., 20% off). Mall stores have fixed prices; bargaining is for markets.
